_publications._publicationTitle: Icariin Promotes Osteogenic Differentiation in a Cell Model with NF1 Gene Knockout by Activating the cAMP/PKA/CREB Pathway.

_contextSnippet: neurofibromin expression was undetectable in 2−7 and 2−12 cell lines
details: Successfully knocked out NF1 gene in C2C12 cells, creating stable cell lines 2-7 and 2-12 with undetectable neurofibromin protein expression
